name: soc2 evidence collection: when controls.yaml entries from non-soc2 frameworks coexist, the validator only enforces coverage for framework: soc2-tsc
command:
mkdir -p compliance/evidence/CC1.1 && touch compliance/evidence/CC1.1/x.txt && printf "- framework: soc2-tsc
  control_id: CC1.1
  satisfied_by: [rubric_rule]
  legal_review_status: pending
- framework: eu-ai-act
  control_id: Article-14
  satisfied_by: [hook]
  legal_review_status: pending
" > compliance/controls.yaml && bash "$CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT/rubric/detectors/validate-evidence-folder.sh" --evidence-dir "$PWD/compliance/evidence" --controls-file "$PWD/compliance/controls.yaml" --check-coverage --framework soc2-tsc && echo ok 1>&2
